CVE-2019-9923.title: tar: null-pointer dereference in pax_decode_header in sparse.c
CVE-2019-9923.description: pax_decode_header in sparse.c in GNU Tar before 1.32 had a NULL pointer dereference when parsing certain archives that have malformed extended headers.

CVE-2021-20193.title: tar: Memory leak in read_header() in list.c
CVE-2021-20193.description: A flaw was found in the src/list.c of tar. This flaw allows an attacker who can submit a crafted input file to tar to cause uncontrolled consumption of memory. The highest threat from this vulnerability is to system availability.

CVE-2023-39804.title: tar: Incorrectly handled extension attributes in PAX archives can lead to a crash
CVE-2023-39804.description: A flaw was found in tar. This issue occurs when extended attributes are processed in PAX archives, and could allow an attacker to cause an application crash, resulting in a denial of service.

CVE-2026-5704.title: A flaw was found in tar. A remote attacker could exploit this vul ...
CVE-2026-5704.description: A flaw was found in tar. A remote attacker could exploit this vulnerability by crafting a malicious archive, leading to hidden file injection with fully attacker-controlled content. This bypasses pre-extraction inspection mechanisms, potentially allowing an attacker to introduce malicious files onto a system without detection.
